name: php-foundation
description: Shared PHP foundation skills for the SDLC marketplace. Contains stack-agnostic conventions: php-conventions (modern PHP 8.x idioms — readonly properties, enums, match, constructor promotion, strict_types, PSR-12), composer-tooling (PSR-4 autoloading, version constraints, scripts, platform requirements) and php-testing (PHPUnit + Pest, data providers, test doubles, fixtures, coverage). Referenced by laravel-plugin and symfony-plugin. No agent, no stack profile — pure shared library.
